footer.tagline: Team coordination, simplified for sports clubs.
footer.tagline2: Built for clubs, coaches, parents and players.

home.badge: The platform for amateur sports clubs
home.title: Your club's energy, finally coordinated.
home.subtitle: No more lost WhatsApp call-ups. Real club coordination: attendance, reminders, communication — all in one app. And if some prefer to stay on WhatsApp, the option is one click away.
home.featuresBody: Call-ups, attendance, reminders and stats — everything is handled inside Clubero. WhatsApp stays available as an option for anyone who doesn't want to leave the group.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your club's coordination?
home.ctaBody: Join clubs that replace chaos with clarity.
home.feat1Body: Send your call-ups in seconds. Players and parents respond in one click.
home.feat2Body: Rosters, parent links, numbers and positions — all in one place.
home.feat3Body: No more chasing. Reminders go out on their own.
home.feat4Body: Clubero is your main channel. If some members prefer to stay on WhatsApp or email, share the formatted message in one click.
home.feat5Body: Create a tournament with groups, brackets, schedule and standings. Share a public TV link to follow scores live.
home.feat6Body: Enter the score and stats (goals, tries, 3-pointers) tailored to each sport.
home.feat7Body: See who came, who missed, and spot season trends.
home.feat8Body: Ask questions in plain language — the assistant knows your club, teams, stats and upcoming events.
home.feat9Body: Wall, mentions, read receipts, files — all club life in one place.
home.feat10Body: Role-based access, parental controls and data hosted in Europe.
home.feat11Body: Every player gets a full profile: week-by-week attendance heatmap, stats (goals, cards, games played), coach feedback per event and AI-generated season review. Parents access it directly.
home.feat12Body: Your club's Instagram, Facebook and X posts appear automatically in the Clubero wall. Members see everything in one place, no need to juggle between apps.
home.feat13Body: Import your players, parents and coaches from your existing Excel file. If the columns don't match, the AI maps and normalises everything automatically before import.
home.feat14Body: Every tournament generates its official PDF regulations in one click, in French or English, based on its configuration. Ready to share or print.
home.feat15Body: Football, basketball, rugby, handball, volleyball — one club can manage multiple sports with stats and formats adapted to each discipline.

whatsapp.body: Call-ups lost in the thread, responses drowning in notifications, parents missing the info: Clubero centralizes everything in one clear place. And for those who'd rather stay on WhatsApp, one button shares the formatted message into the group in a single tap.
whatsapp.p1Body: Call-ups, attendance responses, reminders, stats and per-event chat — one place, nothing gets lost.
whatsapp.p2Body: A parent or player wants to stay on WhatsApp? One button copies the formatted message ready to share. You keep the tracking in the app.
whatsapp.p3Body: Call-ups can also go out by email. You cover every channel effortlessly.
whatsapp.p4Title: No API, no number to configure
whatsapp.p4Body: WhatsApp sharing uses your phone's native share. Nothing for the club to install.
whatsapp.ctaNote: Everything in the app — WhatsApp and email stay optional

ai.body: Ask questions in plain language. The assistant reads your data in real time — call-ups, attendance, player stats, upcoming events — and answers instantly.
ai.p1Body: "Who's missing on Saturday?", "What's my attendance average?", "What's my next match?"
ai.p2Body: Coach, parent, player or admin — the assistant respects what you're allowed to see.
ai.p3Body: The bottom-right widget answers questions about the product, pricing and demo flow, 24/7.
ai.p4Body: Your conversations aren't used to train a model. GDPR-compliant.
ai.ctaNote: Included in every plan · No setup
ai.mockQ1: Who hasn't responded for Saturday yet?
ai.mockAskAgain: Want me to send them a reminder?

clubWall.body: The club and per-team walls bring together announcements, photos, mentions and read receipts. Connect Instagram, Facebook or X: new club posts arrive automatically in the wall, no copy-paste.
clubWall.p1Body: A public area for the club, a private feed per team — everyone sees what matters to them.
clubWall.p2Body: Connect your accounts once. Every new club post lands on the wall with image and link.
clubWall.p3Body: Mention a player, parent or full team. See who has read, without chasing.
clubWall.p4Body: Share match photos, call-up PDFs or regulations. Pin important messages at the top.
clubWall.cta: See the wall in a demo
clubWall.mockPostAdminBody: 🏆 Huge well done to the U13s for their 4-1 win yesterday! See you Saturday for the group final.
clubWall.mockPostSocialBody: Photo recap of the U11 tournament day — massive thanks to the volunteers! 📸
clubWall.mockComposerPh: Write a message to the club…

playerJournal.body: Every player (and their parents) gets a full profile: week-by-week attendance, sport-specific stats, coach feedback after each match and an AI season review. All private, all role-aware.
playerJournal.p1Body: See player consistency at a glance, week by week, across the whole season.
playerJournal.p2Body: Goals, assists, cards, tries, 3-pointers, saves… the right metrics for each team's sport.
playerJournal.p3Body: Rating, strengths, areas to work on and sport-specific tags — entered in seconds after each match or session.
playerJournal.p4Body: Generate a season review, a development report or a one-to-one prep in one click from coach feedback and stats. Then refine through an AI dialogue.
playerJournal.mockFeedbackCoach: Coach Marc · U13 vs FC Riverside
playerJournal.mockFeedbackBody: Great reading of the game, two assists. To work on: left-foot finishing.
playerJournal.mockAiBody: Steady season, clear progress on playmaking. Recommendation: weak-foot finishing drills.

coachAssist.body: Clubero combines a conversational AI assistant with proactive insights that remind the coach what to do — call-ups to send, missing follow-ups, feedback to write. Nothing falls through the cracks.
coachAssist.p1Body: "4 players haven't replied", "No feedback recorded for Saturday's match", "Squad incomplete for Tuesday" — surfaced on the home screen as soon as you open the app.
coachAssist.p2Body: "Create the U13 call-up for Saturday", "Who missed the last 3 trainings?", "Draft a message to the group" — the assistant gets it done.
coachAssist.p3Body: Every insight offers the direct action: send a reminder, create the event, record notes, send the nudge.
coachAssist.p4Body: A smart checklist guides you to set up your team in your first week — branding, roster, first event.
coachAssist.mockTask1: 4 players haven't replied to Saturday's match
coachAssist.mockTask2: Coach feedback to record for the 18/05 match
coachAssist.mockAssistantQ: Create the U13 call-up for Saturday 2:30 PM
coachAssist.mockAssistantA: ✅ Call-up created for 14 players. Sent by notification + email.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade with ease.
pricing.subtitle: 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.trialBody: Full access to all platform features for 30 days. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.enterpriseBody: Custom pricing based on your needs.
pricing.footer: All plans include European hosting, GDPR compliance and email support.

features.metaDesc: Call-ups, attendance, communication, stats. Discover everything Clubero offers clubs, coaches, parents and players.
features.title: One app for the whole season.
features.subtitle: From the first call-up to the end-of-season review — Clubero covers everything that matters for amateur clubs.
features.screenshotsSubtitle: An experience designed for each role, mobile first.
features.shot1Body: Consolidated view of trainings and matches, by player and period.
features.shot2Body: One-click response, optional reason, unified family calendar.
features.shot4Body: Next event, attendance confirmation, team wall.
features.sportsBody: Score entry and player stats tailored to each team's sport.
features.rolesTitle: Built for every role in the club.
features.rolesBody: Each user gets an experience tailored to their needs.

pillars.b: Create matches, trainings and tournaments in seconds. Call-ups reach the right players and parents instantly.
Manage players, numbers, positions and parent links. Photo, date of birth, contact — all on a single profile.
Automatic follow-ups handle missing responses so coaches don't have to.
After each match or training, the coach captures in seconds: rating, strengths, areas to improve, sport-specific tags. Private history kept on the player's profile.
Generate a season review, development report or 1:1 prep in one click from coach feedback and stats. Then refine the summary in dialogue with the AI until it's perfect.
An assistant connected to your club data. Ask questions about attendance, call-ups, stats. Instant answers, role-aware, hosted in Europe.
Everything is handled in Clubero. For those who prefer WhatsApp or email, share the formatted message in one click — without losing tracking in the app.
Club wall with @mentions, pinned posts, read receipts and attachments. Real-time per-event chat.
Mark attendance in one click. View trends per player and per team across the season.
Create a tournament in minutes: groups, brackets, auto schedule, live standings. Shareable public TV page to follow scores.
Enter the score and player stats (goals, tries, 3-pointers, saves…) tailored to each team's sport.
Cmd/Ctrl + K to jump instantly to a player, team or event.
Export a team roster or an event's attendance in one click — Excel-ready.
Accidental deletion? Restore posts, events and players for 7 days.
Admin, coach, assistant coach, manager, player, parent — each role sees exactly what concerns them. Parents only access their child's information.
Every player gets a full profile: week-by-week attendance heatmap, stats (goals, cards, games played), coach feedback per event and AI-generated season review. Parents access it directly.
Your club's Instagram, Facebook and X posts appear automatically in the Clubero wall. Members see everything in one place, no need to juggle between apps.
Import your players, parents and coaches from your existing Excel file. If the columns don't match, the AI maps and normalises everything automatically before import.
Every tournament generates its official PDF regulations in one click, in French or English, based on its configuration. Ready to share or print.
Football, basketball, rugby, handball, volleyball — one club can manage multiple sports with stats and formats adapted to each discipline.
Seasons, achievements and automatic timeline: every match, goal and trophy enriches the player's story.
Track cards, suspensions and games served. Alerts before each call-up to avoid line-up mistakes.
Shareable offline link for adults: achievements, seasons and timeline visible publicly (opt-in, never for minors).

faq.metaDesc: Answers to common questions about Clubero — pricing, setup, GDPR, parental controls and more.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer? Contact us — we're happy to help.

items.a: Clubero is built for amateur sports clubs. Coaches, club staff, parents and players each get a tailored experience.

In V1, Clubero covers 8 team sports with score entry and sport-specific player stats: football, futsal, basketball, rugby, handball, volleyball, ice hockey and field hockey. More sports are coming — tell us which one you're missing.
Yes. Our Discovery offer gives you a 30-day free trial with no credit card, for one team up to 25 members. Move to the Club plan when you need more teams or features.

items.q: How long does it take to set up a club?
items.a: Most clubs are operational in under an hour. Guided onboarding is included with the Club and Federation plans.

items.q: How do you handle minors and parental consent?
items.a: Players under 18 can be linked to one or more parent accounts. By default, parents control responses and visibility on their child's behalf.
All club data is hosted on European infrastructure and Clubero is GDPR-compliant. Members can request an export or deletion at any time.

items.q: Can I import my existing roster?
items.a: Yes. We support CSV import during onboarding, and our team can help you migrate from spreadsheets or other tools.
Clubero is mobile-first. It works in any modern browser and can be installed as a PWA on iOS and Android for a native experience.
Email support is included on every plan. The Club and Federation plans get priority support and dedicated onboarding.

contact.metaDesc: Contact the Clubero team: product questions, demos, partnerships or support for your sports club. We reply within 24 hours.
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitlePre: Question, partnership or just curious? Write to us — we'll get back to you within
contact.successToast: Message sent. We'll get back to you within 48 business hours.
contact.errorToast: Couldn't send. Try again or write to hello@clubero.app.

demo.metaDesc: Book a 15-minute Clubero demo. We'll set up your first team with you.
demo.title: See Clubero in action.
demo.subtitlePre: Tell us a bit about your club — we'll get back to you within
perks: We'll set up your first team with you
Help migrating from your current tool
demo.rgpd: We never share your details. GDPR-compliant.
demo.successToast: Request sent. We'll get back to you within 48 business hours.
demo.errorToast: Couldn't send. Try again or write to hello@clubero.app.

home.subtitle: Groups, brackets, schedule, fields, live standings and online registration — everything included. Share a public link or a TV screen to follow scores live in the venue.
home.feat1Body: Draws, multi-field schedule and qualifications computed for you.
home.feat2Body: Scores update in real time. Spectators and teams follow from their phone.
home.feat3Body: Public registration page, organiser validation, team cap, player rosters and Stripe Connect payouts.
home.feat4Body: Dedicated link for big screens — current matches, upcoming matches and rolling standings.
home.feat5Body: From your config (format, points, tie-breakers, match length), Clubero generates the full PDF regulations in English or French. Ready to sign, share or print.
home.feat6Body: Invite collaborators and referees, manage officials, and dress the public page with your sponsors and partners.

pricing.title: Tournaments
pricing.subtitle: For organizers outside a Clubero club.
pricing.info: Pay per event. No subscription, access to the Clubero Tournaments module for one tournament.

start.metaDesc: Create your Clubero account and launch your tournament in minutes. Pay per event, no subscription.
start.heading: Start a tournament
start.subheading: Log in or create your account in seconds. No subscription required — pay per event.
start.passwordError: Password must be 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase and a digit.
start.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
start.expiredBody: Your email confirmation link is no longer valid. Enter your email to get a new one.
start.resendSent: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox.

onboarding.title: Switch to Clubero with ease.
onboarding.subtitle: We help you migrate your club, teams and data in just a few days.
onboarding.importTitle: What we can import for you.
onboarding.importSubtitle: Bring whatever you have — files, spreadsheets, lists. We'll handle the rest.

imports.b: All your teams, age groups and seasons.
Parent contacts and links to their children.
Club logo, team and player photos.

steps.b: Spreadsheets, lists or exports — in whatever format you have.
Cleanup, structuring and validation with you.
Teams, roles, branding and settings tailored to you.
We train your coaches and you're up and running.

onboarding.humanSubtitle: We help you throughout the entire onboarding process.

humanPoints.b: A dedicated point of contact while we set up your club.
We collect your existing data and import it cleanly.
Settings, roles, branding, email templates — we handle it with you.
A team reachable quickly by email, in English or French.

faq.q: Do we have to recreate everything manually?
faq.a: No. We can import a large part of your data — teams, players, parents, schedules — from your existing spreadsheets or exports.
Most clubs are operational within a few days. The exact duration depends on the volume of data and your availability to validate it with us.

faq.q: Do we need any special tools?
faq.a: No. A simple browser is enough. Clubero works on desktop, tablet and mobile (PWA on iOS / Android).

faq.q: What if our data lives in several files?
faq.a: No problem. We consolidate and structure everything for you before the import.
Yes. We adapt the import to your calendar and can preserve your match and event history if you wish.
Email support stays available. We remain reachable for adjustments, additional training and new teams.

onboarding.ctaBody: Let's talk about your club. We'll show you Clubero and plan the migration together.

tournamentsPage.title: Modern, live and community-driven tournaments.
tournamentsPage.subtitle: Run tournaments with live scores, public standings, mobile referees and a modern fan experience.
tournamentsPage.everythingTitle: Everything for your tournaments, in one place.
tournamentsPage.everythingSubtitle: A complete ecosystem designed for the field and the big screen.
tournamentsPage.liveSubtitle: Your referees and organizers stay in control without leaving the pitch.

livePoints.b: Enter scores straight from your phone.
Referees confirm results live on mobile.
Assign and reshuffle fields in seconds.
Clear, traceable history of every decision.
One scan opens the public page.

tournamentsPage.publicSubtitle: Parents, players and fans follow the tournament live, from anywhere.

publicPoints.b: Always up to date, one link away.
Designed to be checked from the stands.
Link, QR code, social — one click.

tournamentsPage.tvSubtitle: Show the tournament on a big screen, in the clubhouse or at the venue.
tournamentsPage.formatsSubtitle: Adapt Clubero to your competition, not the other way around.

formats.b: Final phase after a regular season.

tournamentsPage.mobileSubtitle: Designed to be used one-handed, between matches.

mobilePoints.b: Big buttons, few taps, quick validation.
Every key action within thumb's reach.
Field and public stay in sync.

tournamentsPage.pricingNote: Unlimited tournaments included with Clubero Club.
tournamentsPage.finalBody: Launch a tournament in minutes, or see Clubero in action with our team.

faq.a: Yes. Teams that don't use Clubero daily can register via the public page and be managed just like internal teams.

faq.q: Does it work with limited internet on the field?
faq.a: The referee mobile interface is lightweight and works on 3G/4G. Score updates sync as soon as the connection is back.

faq.q: Can I change the schedule during the tournament?
faq.a: Absolutely. You can reschedule, swap fields, or adjust times in seconds. The public page and TV mode update instantly.

faq.q: Is there a limit on the number of teams?
faq.a: No hard limit. Clubero handles tournaments from 4 to 100+ teams with automatic scheduling.

faq.q: Can spectators follow without an account?
faq.a: Yes. The public page is accessible to anyone via a link or QR code — no signup required.

faq.q: How does the TV mode work?
faq.a: Open the dedicated TV link on any screen (smart TV, projector, laptop). It displays live standings, upcoming matches and current scores in full screen — zero installation.
